title: Readiness Check Response
description: Extended health check response that includes dependency readiness status. Used when services need to report whether their downstream dependencies (database, NATS, object storage) are connected and operational.

status.description: 'ok' when all dependencies are connected. 'degraded' when some are unavailable. 'unhealthy' when critical dependencies are down.

dependencies.description: Map of dependency name to its status. Keys are dependency identifiers (e.g., 'nats', 'mongodb', 'minio').
